source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A $\pi$ meson with a momentum of $5 m_{\pi} c$ makes an elastic collision with a proton ($m_{p}=7 m_{\pi}$) which is initially at rest (Fig. 3.20). What is the total energy in c.m. system?

candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A $\pi$ meson with a momentum of $5 m_{\pi} c$ makes an elastic collision with a proton ($m_{p}=7 m_{\pi}$) which is initially at rest (Fig. 3.20). What is the total energy in c.m. system?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL object placeholder string rather than a concrete file path or URL
metadata.reasoning_chain: Solution: (b) $E^{2}-P^{2} c^{2}$ is invariant under Lorentz transformation, so the total energy $E^{\prime}$ in the c.m. frame is given by $$E^{2}-P^{2} c^{2}=E^{\prime 2},$$ as the total momentum in the c.m frame is by definition zero. Hence $$E^{\prime 2}=(\sqrt{26}+7)^{2} m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}-25 m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}=(14 \sqrt{26}+50) m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4},$$ or $$E^{\prime}=\sqrt{14 \sqrt{26}+50} m_{\pi} c^{2}=11.02 m_{\pi} c^{2} .$$

problem_main_record.normalized_question_text: A $\pi$ meson with a momentum of $5 m_{\pi} c$ makes an elastic collision with a proton ($m_{p}=7 m_{\pi}$) which is initially at rest (Fig. 3.20). What is the total energy in c.m. system?
problem_main_record.reasoning_chain: Solution: (b) $E^{2}-P^{2} c^{2}$ is invariant under Lorentz transformation, so the total energy $E^{\prime}$ in the c.m. frame is given by $$E^{2}-P^{2} c^{2}=E^{\prime 2},$$ as the total momentum in the c.m frame is by definition zero. Hence $$E^{\prime 2}=(\sqrt{26}+7)^{2} m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}-25 m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}=(14 \sqrt{26}+50) m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4},$$ or $$E^{\prime}=\sqrt{14 \sqrt{26}+50} m_{\pi} c^{2}=11.02 m_{\pi} c^{2} .$$
